attachments.name: KCI - Individual Personal Accident Claim Form.pdf

EmailTemplate.description: Follow up email to Personal Accident claim.
EmailTemplate.name: FNOL to Insured – Personal Accident
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for speaking with me on the phone today.
I am sorry to hear of your accident and wish you well in your recovery.
In order for us to register a claim with insurers, please may you kindly forward the following:
- Overview of your accident, providing as much detail as possible - Date of the accident - The attached claim form to be fully completed - 13 weeks prior to the accident date salary confirmation – this can be by way of your invoices created or pay slips over the last 13 week period prior to the accident. This is to determine your weekly benefit amount payable should your claim be successful - Proof that you were in work or commuting at the time of the accident - GP certificates covering your absence from work - Copy of any hospital discharge correspondence issued to you.
Attached are your policy wording and schedule to assist.
Please also see attached Accident Report Form to be completed.
(Delete below where applicable)
This part of your policy is an accident benefit policy that covers you for an identifiable physical injury sustained during the Period of Insurance and Operative Time which is caused by an Accident and which is solely and independent of any other cause.
OPERATIVE TIME is whilst in pursuit of Your normal occupational duties in connection with Your Business or whilst travelling directly between Your residence and place of employment.
DEFERMENT PERIOD is the period at the beginning of a period of Temporary Total Disablement in respect of any one Accident during which a benefit is not payable as discussed on the phone.
I look forward to hearing from you, please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any further questions.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
